name: Olive Garden Neopolitan Ziti
recipeIngredient: 28 oz Canned tomatoes - Italian style or plum
1/2 cup Fresh basil, packed and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake or pan-fry the sausages until fully cooked. Drain and cool.
2. Halve the sausages and cut into 1-inch slices.
3. In a separate skillet, sauté the bell peppers in olive oil over moderate heat until they are crisp but not soft.
4. In a heavy saucepan, add the tomatoes, tomato puree, garlic, olive oil, and fresh basil. Bring to a light simmer on moderate heat.
5. Add the sauteed pepper strips and cooked sausage to the sauce. Heat for 3 to 5 minutes.
6. Serve the pasta topped with the sausage, peppers, and marinara sauce. Garnish each plate with parsley bouquets. Pass Parmesan cheese on the side.
